checklist.gap: This is scoped consumer readiness only, not strict full objective closure.
checklist.requirement: Each active MainRegimeV2/direct lane has its own >=95% calibrated consumer factor.

checklist.gap: Required source-label equivalence intake files are missing; NIFTY/IDX external candidates lack owner-approved MainRegimeV2 crosswalk.
checklist.requirement: Validation survives other markets/species with source-owned labels or owner-approved equivalence.

checklist.gap: Strict exact 1h remains partial and native subhour source overlap remains 0/4.
checklist.requirement: Validation survives other cycles/timeframes, including strict exact 1h and native sub-hour where claimed.

checklist.gap: Known upstream source package still matches local; no newer source-owned recency extension rows.
checklist.requirement: Source-panel recency extends beyond 2026-01-30 before provider candles after that date are promoted.

checklist.coverage: scoped direct ready=True; full species complete=False; source scan=blocked_no_ready_direct_species_source
checklist.gap: Missing spoofing/layering, quote stuffing, pinging, bear raid/painting tape, and social/text pump-dump matched-negative row sources.
checklist.requirement: Direct Manipulation full species coverage uses direct positive rows plus matched normal controls.

checklist.coverage: External NIFTY/IDX candidates were screened but not promoted.
checklist.gap: No proxy promotion occurred; objective remains open.
checklist.requirement: Do not rely on proxy signals or generated/OHLCV-only labels for completion.

restated_objective: Every active regime/lane must have its own >=95% calibrated confidence evidence.
The evidence must survive validation on other markets/species and other timeframes/cycles.
Direct Manipulation must use direct row sources with matched negative controls.
No source-label proxy, OHLCV-only generated label, or owner-unapproved taxonomy crosswalk can satisfy the strict goal.
